name: NexGuild
description: A full-stack, two-sided micro-work platform connecting contributors who complete tasks and surveys with organisations that need human-powered data work — AI data collection, annotation, moderation, and QA. Contributors earn NexCoins and redeem them for real gift vouchers.
highlights: 6-tier role-based access control: owner, admin, reviewer, finance, support, moderator
NexCoin economy — 1,000 NexCoins = $1 USD — with automatic commission splits on every earning event
Live offerwall integrations (CPX Research, TheoremReach) with real HMAC hash postback validation
8 independent task-verification types, from proof codes to Telegram bot checks to screenshot review
Gamification system: XP, levels, daily streaks, contributor leaderboard
NexLeader referral system paying lifetime commission on guild members' earnings
Full admin panel across 74+ routes, zero build errors
17 SEO blog posts, Google Analytics 4 and Search Console verified
Google Drive integration via Apps Script for file-based task submissions
hCaptcha bot protection and Resend transactional email
whatWasBuilt: Designed and shipped the entire platform solo: database schema and RLS policies, the NexCoin ledger and commission engine, 8 task-verification pipelines, two offerwall postback integrations with hash validation, a 6-role admin system, and the full contributor dashboard — architected end-to-end and directed through Claude Code.

name: xtoolkit.live
tagline: Free online tools platform — 44 tools, zero paywall
description: A free online tool factory with 44 tools across developer utilities, SEO, X/Twitter, email/privacy, AI writing, and text formatting. No signup, no paywall, no data stored — tools run in the browser or process-and-discard server-side.
highlights: 44 tools across 6 categories — 21 of them developer utilities alone
Gmail Account Checker built on raw SMTP verification over TCP port 25
AI Bio Generator and AI Text Detector powered by Groq's Llama 3.3 70B with automatic multi-key rotation
Chrome Extension published on the Chrome Web Store, 5-star rating, MV3 with a 15-second auto-refresh service worker
Prerendering system that makes the React SPA crawlable for SEO
Production-grade API security stack: Helmet, rate limiting, XSS cleaning, HPP, SQL-injection blocking
24 SEO blog articles across 4 topic clusters, traffic from 40+ countries
OpenAPI spec as the API source of truth, codegen via Orval into React Query hooks and Zod validators
whatWasBuilt: Built the full pnpm monorepo solo: a Vite/React frontend with 44 tool pages, an Express v5 API with a hardened security middleware stack, a published Chrome extension, an OpenAPI-driven codegen pipeline, and an SEO layer (prerendering, split sitemaps, structured data) on top of a client-rendered SPA.

name: StarScoopDaily
description: A celebrity and entertainment news site with an automated AI article-generation pipeline, publishing 1,200+ word articles via Groq's Llama 3.3 70B and a GitHub Contents API publishing system that works around Vercel's read-only production filesystem.
highlights: Automated AI article-generation pipeline producing 1,200+ word articles from live RSS headline feeds
GitHub Contents API publishing system — solved Vercel's read-only filesystem at runtime
Full 6-tab admin panel: news fetcher, article generator, ads manager, site controls, stats, published articles
14 content categories with per-category color theming
Dynamic OG image generation on the edge for every article
Monetized via Adsterra display advertising
Google Analytics 4 active from launch
whatWasBuilt: Built the automated content pipeline end-to-end: RSS ingestion and scandal-scoring, AI generation via Groq, an image-sourcing layer, and a GitHub-Contents-API publishing flow that treats the git repo itself as the CMS database — since Vercel's production filesystem can't be written to at runtime.
